data.description: Introduce a new exploration workflow for discovery and investigation knots. Users can create exploration knots with `kno new -e`. The workflow progresses through states: ready_for_exploration → exploration → (shipped | abandoned). A knot can only transition to shipped if it has at least one related knot (representing the output/outcome of exploration). If no related knots exist when transitioning to shipped, the system must reject the transition and guide the user to abandon the knot instead. The -e flag is the standard shorthand for selecting the exploration workflow template.
